name: Acheron
kit: Accumulates Slashed Dream stacks from Nihility ally skills and debuffs on enemies; Ultimate spends all stacks for massive AoE Lightning DMG
planar: Izumo Gensei and Takama Divine Realm

name: Firefly
kit: Transforms into SAM combat form via Ultimate; deals massive Fire Weakness Break and Super Break DMG; gains Fire RES PEN in SAM form

name: Feixiao
kit: Accumulates Stormborn charges from allies' follow-up attacks; spends charges on a powerful multi-hit Ultimate; high Wind RES PEN

name: Jingliu
kit: Enters Spectral Transmigration state by consuming HP from allies; gains massive CRIT Rate and Ice DMG boost in this state

name: Seele
kit: Gains Resurgence (extra turn + DMG buff) after defeating enemies; stacks SPD and DMG buffs in Resurgence state

name: Kafka
kit: Basic ATK advances DoT timers; Skill applies Shock; Ultimate immediately triggers all DoTs on all enemies once

name: Black Swan
kit: Stacks Arcana debuffs on enemies; high Arcana stacks trigger Epiphany which greatly amplifies DoT DMG taken

name: Dan Heng • Imbibitor Lunae
kit: Spends Squama Sacrosancta to enhance Basic ATK (up to 3 stacks); 3-stack Enhanced Basic hits hard and applies Imaginary DMG; very SP-hungry

name: Jing Yuan
kit: Summons Lightning Lord which attacks when any ally takes a turn; Skill increases Lightning Lord's hits; FuA scales with hits count

name: Blade
kit: Deals DMG scaling with Max HP; heals from kills; FuA triggered after accumulating hits received; works with HP-drain synergies

name: Dr. Ratio
kit: Triggers bonus FuA when enemies have 3+ debuffs; applies Cognition debuff stacking vulnerability; great single-target damage

name: Jade
kit: Bonds a Debt Collector ally to sacrifice HP for Jade's Fleeting Fancies charges; FuA scales with FuA events from allies

name: Himeko
kit: Gains Charge stacks from Break events; at 3 stacks performs a FuA; excels in Super Break content

name: Argenti
kit: Ultimate can be cast at 90 or 180 energy for weaker/stronger versions; physical AoE that stacks Apotheosis buff from hits

name: Yunli
kit: Ultimate provokes enemies to attack her; counters with powerful Parry follow-up; also counters via Skill on being hit

name: The Herta
kit: Massively empowers all Erudition follow-up attacks; gains Interpretation stacks from ally FuAs; Ultimate deals enormous AoE Ice DMG

name: Rappa
kit: Enters Sealform which deals multi-hit attacks that reduce Toughness regardless of enemy weakness type; amplifies Super Break

name: Mydei
kit: Accumulates Vendetta stacks at HP thresholds; enters powerful Kingly Wrath state that deals massive Imaginary DMG and self-heals

name: Castorice
kit: HP-based Remembrance DPS with revive mechanic; converts ally HP consumption into massive burst damage via Netherwing Butterfly

name: Aglaea
kit: SPD-based DPS that empowers her Memokeeper memosprite; the higher the team's SPD, the greater the damage output

name: Ruan Mei
kit: Increases all-element RES PEN and All-Type DMG for team; extends enemy Weakness Broken duration; SPD buff
teammates: Works universally; near-mandatory in break teams

name: Robin
kit: Gives massive ATK% buff to all allies; Ultimate advances all allies' actions immediately and boosts FuA DMG enormously
teammates: Pairs well with any DPS; best in FuA teams (Feixiao, Dr. Ratio, Jing Yuan, Jade, Yunli)

name: Sparkle
kit: Restores SP to team; massive CRIT DMG buff to one target; advances single ally's action; enables SP-hungry carries

name: Bronya
kit: Advances one ally's action and gives ATK% buff; Ultimate gives ATK% and DMG% buff to one target; depletes her own SP

name: Sunday
kit: Advances action of summons/memosprites; energy regen and CRIT DMG buff; specialised bonuses for summon-type characters

name: Jiaoqiu
kit: Stacks Ashen Roast debuffs via Skill; high stacks apply Heartsear which multiplies all DMG received; Fire DoT
planar: Izumo Gensei and Takama Divine Realm

name: Silver Wolf
kit: Implants an enemy weakness matching an ally's element; reduces enemy DEF, ATK, and SPD; enables mono-element teams

name: Fugue
kit: Enhances Super Break DMG for the team; DEF shred; reduces enemy Toughness directly; Foxian Prayer mechanic boosts Break efficiency

name: Fu Xuan
kit: Matrix of Prescience redistributes incoming HP damage across team; passively grants CRIT Rate to all allies; strong self-sustain

name: Aventurine
kit: Stacks Blind Bet to generate team-wide Fortified Wager shields; performs FuA when a shielded ally is hit; versatile tank

name: Luocha
kit: Auto-heals the lowest HP ally when attacking; Abyss Flower field cleanses all debuffs from team via Ultimate; consistent passive healing
relics: Passerby of Wandering Cloud (2pc) + Longevous Disciple (2pc)
teammates: any team needing debuff cleanse or passive healing

name: Huohuo
kit: AoE heals each turn; Ultimate restores energy to all allies and grants ATK% buff; Fiends mark enemies for bonus healing
relics: Passerby of Wandering Cloud (2pc) + Longevous Disciple (2pc)

name: Lingsha
kit: Heals via memosprite Fuyuan; Fuyuan reduces enemy Toughness and enhances Super Break DMG; great in break teams

name: Welt
kit: Slows and delays enemy actions; AoE Imaginary DMG; Imprisonment applies SPD reduction to enemies

name: Bailu
kit: Chain heals that bounce between allies; one passive revive per battle; Invigoration buff reduces incoming DMG
relics: Passerby of Wandering Cloud (2pc) + Longevous Disciple (2pc)
teammates: Any team; revive is unique utility

name: Topaz & Numby
kit: Marks enemy with Proof of Debt; Numby attacks marked enemies repeatedly; every ally FuA advances Numby's action and increases its DMG

name: Boothill
kit: Stand-off mechanic locks an enemy; deals massive Fire Break DMG; Super Break scales with ATK and Break Effect

name: March 7th (Hunt)
kit: Designates a Shifu; performs FuA when Shifu uses Skill; absorbs hits targeting Shifu and gains Charge for enhanced Basic ATK

name: Tingyun
kit: Benediction buff gives ATK% to one ally and triggers bonus Lightning DMG on their attacks; Ultimate restores energy to one ally

name: Pela
kit: Removes enemy buffs; Ultimate applies Exposed debuff reducing enemy DEF by 40%; reliable free unit

name: Gallagher
kit: Heals and applies Besotted debuff that amplifies Break DMG received; high Break Effect scaling; accessible 4-star
relics: Passerby of Wandering Cloud (2pc) + Thief of Shooting Meteor (2pc)

name: Herta
kit: Performs FuA when any enemy HP drops to 50% or below; AoE Ice DMG; essential in The Herta teams for Interpretation stacks

name: Asta
kit: Stacks Charging to boost team-wide SPD via Ultimate; Fire DMG on Skill; ATK stacking buff; accessible free unit

name: Bronya
kit: Advances one ally's action and gives ATK% buff; Ultimate gives ATK% and DMG% buff to one target; depletes her own SP

name: Sparkle
kit: Restores SP to team; massive CRIT DMG buff to one target; advances single ally's action; enables SP-hungry carries

name: Clara
kit: Svarog marks and counter-attacks enemies who target Clara; reduces incoming DMG; original counter archetype

name: Gepard
kit: Ultimate generates powerful team-wide shield scaling with DEF; E6 is farmable and highly effective F2P option

name: March 7th
kit: Shields single ally each turn; counter-attacks when shielded ally is hit; can Freeze enemies; free starting character

name: Trailblazer (Harmony)
kit: Imbues ally ATK with Imaginary Toughness reduction; Ultimate applies Mem's Support which enables Super Break DMG scaling off ATK; core break support

name: Trailblazer (Destruction)
kit: Absorbs hits for allies; Physical AoE attacks; generates Trailblaze stacks from DMG received for stronger Ultimate

name: Trailblazer (Preservation)
kit: Generates Fire shields for allies; shields scale with DEF; provides team protection similar to Gepard

name: Qingque
kit: Draws jade tiles each turn; when all four tiles match, Enhanced Basic ATK hits all enemies with massive Quantum DMG; extremely SP-hungry

name: Sampo
kit: Multi-hit Skill stacks Wind Shear DoT; Ultimate extends all DoT durations; cheap Nihility slot for Kafka teams

name: Yukong
kit: Roaring Bowstrings gives CRIT Rate and CRIT DMG to the entire team; timing-sensitive; must maintain buff uptime carefully

name: Hanya
kit: Applies Burden to enemies; slaying Burden enemies SPD-buffs an ally; Ultimate gives ATK% buff and SP back; solid 4-star support
teammates: Any DPS that benefits from SPD and ATK buffs

name: Yanqing
kit: Soulsteel Sync with a shielder grants CRIT Rate and FuA; very fragile if hit without shield; FuA on Frozen enemies

name: Guinaifen
kit: Applies Firekiss DoT via Skill; Firekiss propagates on other attacks; amplifies all DoT DMG dealt to afflicted enemies

name: Natasha
kit: Skill heals single target; Ultimate AoE heals all allies; free starting character; solid early/mid game healer
relics: Passerby of Wandering Cloud (2pc) + Longevous Disciple (2pc)

name: Lynx
kit: Heals and applies Survival Response (extra Max HP) especially to Destruction and Preservation allies; Skill prioritises those paths
relics: Passerby of Wandering Cloud (2pc) + Longevous Disciple (2pc)

name: Serval
kit: Shock DoT on Skill; AoE Lightning hits; Ultimate resets Shock timer on all enemies; early game AoE DPS

name: Dan Heng
kit: Slows enemies on Basic ATK and Skill; enhanced ATK when enemy is slowed; Wind RES PEN; solid early game carry

name: Hook
kit: Enhanced Skill after Talent triggers; DoT from Roasted; short cooldown enhanced Basic ATK; niche 4-star
teammates: Any team as filler Fire DMG

name: Luka
kit: Stacks Bleed DoT via Skill; enhanced Basic ATK boosts Bleed; niche budget Nihility option

name: Xueyi
kit: Deals bonus Quantum DMG scaling with Toughness reduction dealt; FuA on Weakness Break; niche but fun break character

name: Misha
kit: Ultimate hits scale with number of times allies used their Ultimate that cycle; AoE Ice DMG; niche

name: Sushang
kit: Bonus Sword Stance FuA on Weakness Break; SPD buff after Break; niche Physical DPS

name: Arlan
kit: Spends HP instead of SP to use Skill; deals Lightning DMG scaling with missing HP; no SP cost is a unique niche
teammates: any healer to offset HP drain

name: Trailblazer (Remembrance)
kit: Summons Mem memosprite; hybrid sub-DPS and support; Mem deals Ice DMG and buffs the team; free via main story in v3.0
relics: Messenger Traversing Hackerspace (2pc) + Sacerdos' Relived Ordeal (2pc)

name: Tribbie
kit: Skill increases all allies' All-Element RES PEN; also deals follow-up attack damage; unique hybrid that contributes both buffing and personal damage

name: Hyacine
kit: SPD-scaling healer whose memosprite Little Ica deals damage proportional to total healing done; HP-scaling; reach 200 SPD for Tempestuous Halt bonus — each extra SPD above 200 increases healing and damage
relics: Warrior Goddess of Sun and Thunder (4pc)

name: Cipher
kit: Applies a Vulnerability debuff while on-field; deals decent FuA, Skill, and Ultimate damage; SPD-stat focused to hit 160–170 SPD breakpoints for Glamoth bonus

name: Phainon
kit: Enters an Enhanced State that dramatically increases damage output and survivability; CRIT-focused; ATK scales the Enhanced State; needs turn advance and energy support to cycle into Enhanced State frequently

name: Archer
kit: Enters Circuit Connection state where Skill DMG doubles and the turn does not end, stackable twice; Ultimate deals massive Quantum DMG and grants Charge for follow-up attacks triggered by ally attacks; extremely SP-hungry

name: Saber
kit: Core Resonance mechanic gains stacks when allies use Ultimates; high Break DMG that scales on Break Gauge length; DMG boost is tied to Ultimate frequency

name: Hysilens
kit: DoT-focused DPS requiring 120%+ Effect Hit Rate and 3600+ ATK to unlock full damage buffs; 135 SPD recommended for extra turns per cycle; detonates DoTs for high burst
relics: Prisoner in Deep Confinement (2pc) + Revelry by the Sea (2pc)

name: Cerydra
kit: Enables the DPS to use their Skill twice in one turn; increases Skill DMG for the buffed ally; pairs best with carries that deal most of their damage through Skills
relics: Sacerdos' Relived Ordeal (2pc) + Messenger Traversing Hackerspace (2pc)

name: March 7th • Evernight
kit: Summons Evey memosprite; uses 10% HP to summon without spending SP; grants CRIT DMG buff to all memosprites based on her own stats; accumulates Memoria stacks for Evey's powerful follow-up attack

name: Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae
kit: Designates a Bondmate ally; summons Souldragon which cleanses debuffs and shields allies each turn; Ultimate enhances Souldragon to FuA all enemies and deal bonus Bondmate-element DMG; ATK-scaling shields
teammates: any team needing cleanse + FuA summon

name: Cyrene
kit: SPD-scaling support; hitting 180 SPD activates the Causality in Trichotomy bonus ability; buffs DoT and Remembrance team damage; versatile support that fits DoT and Remembrance compositions
relics: Messenger Traversing Hackerspace (2pc) + Sacerdos' Relived Ordeal (2pc)

name: Yao Guang
kit: Increases Elation DMG for team; Ultimate grants an ally a free Elation Skill use; cornerstone buffer that supercharges Silver Wolf Lv.999 and Sparxie; incompatible with Evanescia-focused builds

name: Sparxie
kit: Generates Punchline stacks for the Elation team; functions as both a sub-DPS and Punchline engine; requires 3600+ ATK for Sweet! bonus damage; extremely SP-hungry

name: Ashveil
kit: Marks an enemy as Bait with Skill; every time a Bait enemy is hit by an ally, Ashveil spends Charge to launch a FuA and gains Gluttony stacks; Skill on already-Bait target deals bonus DMG and recovers an SP; DEF shred effect on Gluttony stacks

name: Silver Wolf Lv.999
kit: SPD-scaling Elation DPS; Talent converts excess CRIT Rate into CRIT DMG; Elation DMG scales with SPD — hit breakpoints at 160, 170, 180, 200 SPD for maximum damage

name: Evanescia
kit: CRIT DMG-scaling Elation DPS; aim for 200%+ CRIT DMG; Elation Talent amplifies based on CRIT stats; does NOT synergise with Sparxie or Silver Wolf Lv.999 — run in a separate Elation team

name: Trailblazer (Elation)
kit: Generates Punchline and Certified Banger resources for the Elation team on Skill use; consistently buffs Elation DMG; free unit obtained via story; 160 SPD breakpoint recommended

name: Mortenax Blade
kit: HP-scaling Nihility DPS; 4pc set bonus buffs his CRIT DMG and grants allies 15% DMG boost; applies Comburent debuff; scales on Crit + HP; fits both Acheron debuff teams and FuA teams as a Nihility slot
planar: Izumo Gensei and Takama Divine Realm
teammates: any team needing a Nihility slot with personal damage
